candidates.experience_summary: I don’t have the exact experience for the roles selected. However, I have built a large social media following for a few people.

job_postings.title: Marketing Associate
job_postings.description: We are seeking a creative, professional, and compassionate Marketing Associate to join Amber's Healthcare Services in East Baton Rouge. The candidate will manage digital marketing campaigns, handle referral partner outreach, and coordinate healthcare educational activities. Prior experience in professional services or healthcare marketing is a plus.

introductions.note: I think I would be great at marketing due to my experience with building social media followings in my personal life.
I have a decade of healthcare experience

notifications.subject: New Applicant for Marketing Associate: Baby Boy
notifications.message:
Hello Amber Samantha Yaghi,

A local candidate, Baby Boy, has expressed direct interest in your job posting: **Marketing Associate**.

Cover Note: "I think I would be great at marketing due to my experience with building social media followings in my personal life."

Please log in to Amber's Healthcare to review their complete candidate profile and schedule an interview!
